falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5,500 by 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this key resistance level would contradict the pattern's bearish implications and invalidate the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would indicate extreme overbought conditions, directly contradicting the current pattern's bearish divergence and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume on the NASDAQ exceeds 200% of the 20-day average for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volatility would indicate a major market shift, falsifying the current HOLD signal's assumption of stable consolidation.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
